text: The United States will not tolerate threats to our forces or our allies. Operation Epic Fury is degrading Iran's ability to threaten the region. We stand with Israel, our Gulf partners, and the American service members defending freedom.
verificationNote: Official government account

text: President Trump: "To every member of the Iranian military -- you have two choices. Lay down your arms and receive immunity, or face guaranteed destruction. There will be no third option."
verificationNote: Official government account

text: Make no mistake: we are just getting started. The Iranian regime chose this path when it hid enriched uranium and attacked our bases. Our forces have struck over 2,000 targets. We will not stop until the threat is eliminated.
verificationNote: Official government account

text: We mourn the 6 American heroes killed at Port Shuaiba, Kuwait. Their sacrifice will not be in vain. Iran will pay a heavy price for every American life lost. Our thoughts are with their families.
verificationNote: Official government account

text: CENTCOM UPDATE - March 5: Coalition forces conducted strikes against 47 Iranian military targets including IRGC command centers, missile storage facilities, and air defense sites across western and central Iran. All aircraft returned safely.
verificationNote: Official military command account

text: USS Virginia (SSN-774) engaged and sank IRINS Dena in the Indian Ocean after the vessel was identified heading toward coalition shipping lanes. 79 Iranian sailors recovered. Search and rescue ongoing for remaining crew.
verificationNote: Official military command account

text: TRAVEL ADVISORY - LEVEL 4: DO NOT TRAVEL to Iran, Iraq, Lebanon, Yemen, and the Gulf region. All US citizens should depart immediately. Contact the nearest US Embassy or Consulate for emergency assistance.
verificationNote: Official government account

text: The United States remains open to diplomacy, but Iran must first cease all offensive operations, comply fully with IAEA inspections, and disclose all hidden enrichment activities. The path to peace exists -- Tehran must choose it.
verificationNote: Official government account

text: The criminal American-Zionist aggression against the Iranian nation will be met with the full might of our armed forces. The blood of our martyred Supreme Leader and the innocent children of Minab will not go unavenged. We are ready for a long war.
verificationNote: Official government account

text: Operation True Promise IV continues. The IRGC has launched 9 waves of precision strikes against military targets in the occupied territories. The resistance axis stands united against the aggressors. Victory is certain.
verificationNote: Official government account

text: 180 innocent schoolgirls murdered in Minab by American bombs. This is the 'rules-based order' the West speaks of. We call on the United Nations, the International Criminal Court, and all nations of conscience to hold the US and Israel accountable.
verificationNote: Official government account

text: The brave warriors of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps have targeted every American military installation in the Persian Gulf. 6 American soldiers killed in Kuwait. The era of American impunity in our region is over.
verificationNote: Official IRGC media account

text: Operation Roaring Lion is dismantling Iran's war machine. We eliminated the head of the snake and we will not stop until Iran can never threaten Israel again. Our message to Iran's remaining leaders: the next move is yours.
verificationNote: Official government account

text: IDF UPDATE - Day 6: Iron Dome, David's Sling, and Arrow intercepted the majority of incoming threats across 9 Iranian missile waves. IDF continues offensive operations in Iran, Lebanon, and against Houthi targets. Our forces are operating on all fronts.
verificationNote: Official military account

text: We knocked out their air force, we knocked out their communications and all telecommunications is gone. We have a lot of negotiating leverage, maybe maximum, but we're not looking to settle. They'd like to settle. We're not looking to settle.
verificationNote: Said aboard Air Force One, recorded by press pool. Confirmed by Bloomberg and CNN.

text: Israel is continuing with full force. Our alliance with the United States is deeper than ever. We will not stop until Iran's threat to Israel and the region is permanently eliminated.
verificationNote: Official statement from Israeli PM's office. Reported by Al Jazeera, CNN, Times of Israel.

text: Iran apologizes to Gulf nations for previous attacks on their territories and suggests they will end. However, Iran will not surrender. Our response to American and Israeli aggression will continue until they cease their attacks on our people.
verificationNote: Statement via Iranian state media IRNA. Gulf apology confirmed by Al Jazeera and CNN.

text: Iran has captured United States soldiers since the outbreak of war. The Americans are concealing this from their public. We warn: any ground invasion will be met with the fiercest resistance in history.
verificationNote: Claims unverified. US State Department denied reports. Al Jazeera and multiple outlets reported the claims but noted lack of evidence.

text: Israel will continue wide-scale strikes on Iranian regime targets until the threat is eliminated. We are operating in Tehran and additional areas.
verificationNote: Official statement from Israeli PM's office. Broadcast live on Israeli television. Reported by PBS, Times of Israel.

text: An attack on Cyprus is an attack on all of Europe. We call for an immediate de-escalation and protection of sovereign European territory.
verificationNote: Official Elysee Palace statement following Hezbollah drone strike on RAF Akrotiri. Reported by France24, BBC.

text: The Islamic Republic will not rest until every aggressor has been punished. The blood of my father and the martyrs will not be forgotten.
verificationNote: First official statement as new Supreme Leader following Assembly of Experts election. Broadcast on IRIB. Reported by CNN, Al Jazeera.

text: Iran will surrender unconditionally or we will finish the job. Short term oil price increases are a very small price to pay for destroying Iran's nuclear threat.
verificationNote: Statement confirmed by White House press pool. Reported by NPR, CNN, Bloomberg.

text: We are not asking for a ceasefire. There are no behind-the-scenes contacts with the Americans. Iran will respond proportionally to every aggression.
verificationNote: Statement broadcast on Iranian state television IRIB. Reported by NPR, Al Jazeera.

text: Switzerland believes the attack on Iran constitutes a violation of international law. All parties — the US, Israel, and Iran — have broken international law's prohibition on the use of force.
verificationNote: Official statement issued by Swiss Federal Council. Published on Swiss government website.

text: I urge an end to the violence in Iran and across the Middle East. We must open space for dialogue and find the path to peace.
verificationNote: Statement issued by the Holy See Press Office. Widely covered by international media.

text: President Trump: "We've already won in many ways, but we haven't won enough. The new so-called supreme leader is a lightweight. If he doesn't get our approval, he's not going to last long."
verificationNote: Direct quotes from Trump phone interview with Times of Israel. Corroborated by CBS News, Washington Post.

text: Operation Epic Fury is on track as we enter the second week. We have spared no expense or capability. We can't stop everything Iran fires, but we are winning decisively.
verificationNote: Pentagon press briefing. Hegseth signaled 4-8 week campaign timeline. Washington Times, PBS confirmed.

text: Iran has no interest in negotiations while under attack. Mediation requests from other countries have been rejected. The Islamic Republic is prepared for a long war.
verificationNote: Foreign Ministry spokesperson statement. Reported by Al Jazeera, Reuters.

text: Mojtaba Khamenei is a tyrant like his father. The IDF warns there is no safe place for the Iranian regime. Lebanon has attacked Israel more than Iran itself over the past week.
verificationNote: Israel MFA and IDF statements. Times of Israel confirmed.
